passiveAbilities.name: Barnacle Encrusted Shell
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -1.

activeAbilities.name: Stocked to the Gills
activeAbilities.description: Target Pirate with the Reload [...] ability may immediately use the Reload [...] ability without spending energy.

arcaneAbilities.name: Junk Toss
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Piercing Dmg.
Target suffers 1 Wd then is moved X" directly away.
Target cannot take the Jog action until end of turn.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 4 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Gone Fishin'
arcaneAbilities.description:
Resolve this action with +2 Arcane Stat if there is a Water Feature within 4" of this model.
Target restores X Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Crushing Pressure
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This action deals W damage against models which are further than 1" away. If the enemy suffered 1 or more Wds during this round of melee, they must discard 1 energy.
